scripts.bench: node scripts/setup.mjs && node scripts/preflight.mjs && node scripts/setup-bindings.mjs && node scripts/calibrate.mjs && bash scripts/mf-parser-hyperfine.sh && bash scripts/binding-hyperfine.sh && node scripts/bench-browser.mjs && node report.mjs
scripts.bench:smoke: node scripts/setup.mjs && node scripts/preflight.mjs && node scripts/setup-bindings.mjs && node scripts/calibrate.mjs && bash scripts/mf-parser-hyperfine.sh --warmup 1 --runs 2 && bash scripts/binding-hyperfine.sh --warmup 1 --runs 2 && node scripts/bench-browser.mjs
scripts.bench:parser: node scripts/setup.mjs && node scripts/preflight.mjs && node scripts/calibrate.mjs && bash scripts/mf-parser-hyperfine.sh && node report.mjs
scripts.bench:bindings: node scripts/setup-bindings.mjs && node scripts/calibrate-bindings.mjs && bash scripts/binding-hyperfine.sh
scripts.bench:bindings:browser: node scripts/setup-bindings.mjs && node scripts/calibrate-bindings.mjs && node scripts/bench-browser.mjs
scripts.bench:bindings:smoke: node scripts/setup-bindings.mjs && node scripts/calibrate-bindings.mjs && bash scripts/binding-hyperfine.sh --warmup 1 --runs 2
scripts.bench:bindings:e2e:smoke: node scripts/setup-bindings.mjs && node scripts/calibrate-bindings.mjs && node scripts/bench-browser.mjs
